title: Tallon Christmas Wrapping Paper 4 x 4M Rolls Gift Wrap - 16 Metres and 16 Matching Gift Tags (Contemporary Christmas Design)
features: Elevate your holiday gifting experience with our exquisite set of Christmas wrapping, featuring 4 rolls of gift wrap along with 16 beautifully designed matching tags
This gift wrap set comes in 4 contemporary Christmas designs, allowing you to create beautifully wrapped gifts this year.
The tags have the added detail of iridescent foil, adding a touch of festive sparkle to your presents.
Each of the four rolls of gift wrap measure 4 metres in length and 70cm in width, giving you a total of 16 metres of gift wrap.
The tags measure 11cm by 6cm and are perfectly sized to make a statement without overwhelming your gifts.
Ideal for both personal use and professional gifting, these sets are a must-have accessory for the holiday season, making your presents not only beautifully wrapped but also uniquely personalised.
